chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1821 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case For hearing of main case. 18-04-2024 Mr. Shabbir Ali Bozdar, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant A.G. ***** Learned counsel for petitioner does not press this petition with permission to file fresh one if need arises. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed as not pressed in the above terms. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
